zh.Prague, Bohemia: 捷克斯洛伐克傑普拉哈
zh.St Maria, Prague, Bohemia: 捷克斯洛伐克傑普拉哈
zh.lifeSummary: 當Vladislaus I VON BÖHMEN於1069年出生時，他的父親Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen34歲，母親Świętosława Piast26歲。他於1110年與Richenza von Berg結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1125年4月12日在捷克斯洛伐克傑普拉哈享年56歲，埋葬在捷克斯洛伐克傑普拉哈。

zh-hans.Prague, Bohemia: 捷克斯洛伐克傑普拉哈
zh-hans.St Maria, Prague, Bohemia: 捷克斯洛伐克傑普拉哈
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Vladislaus I VON BÖHMEN于1069年出生时，他的父亲Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen34岁，母亲Świętosława Piast26岁。他于1110年与Richenza von Berg结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1125年4月12日在捷克斯洛伐克傑普拉哈享年56岁，埋葬在捷克斯洛伐克傑普拉哈。

nameMeanings.name: VON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: BÖHMEN
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz.  French Andre, Marthe.
Swiss German: from a short form of the medieval personal name Liborius (see Bohr 1 and Liborio ). This surname is also found in France (mainly Marne).
Swedish (Bohrén): ornamental name from Bohr 3 + the adjectival suffix -én, a derivative of Latin enius ‘relating to’.

variants.name: Bohr
meanings: German: from a short form of the medieval personal name Liborius (see Liborio ), the name of the patron saint of the city of Paderborn.
Germanized form of Sorbian Bór or other Slavic Bor .
Danish and Swedish: from North German   Bahr   ‘bear’.

nameMeanings.name: Vladislaus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of the Slavic name Vladislav, from volod ‘rule’ + slav ‘glory’.

variants.name: Ladislas
meanings: form of Polish Wadisław, Czech Vladislav, or Hungarian László (an old Slavic name composed of volod ‘rule’ + slav ‘glory’), occasionally used in Britain and elsewhere, but mainly as a translation name.

en.lifeSummary: When Vladislaus I VON BÖHMEN was born in 1069, his father, Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen, was 34 and his mother, Świętosława Piast, was 26. He married Richenza von Berg in 1110. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 12 April 1125, in Prague, Bohemia, Czechoslovakia, at the age of 56, and was buried in Prague, Bohemia, Czechoslovakia.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Vladislaus I VON BÖHMEN est né en 1069, son père, Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Świętosława Piast, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Richenza von Berg en 1110. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 12 avril 1125, à Prague, Bohême, Tchécoslovaquie, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Prague, Bohême, Tchécoslovaquie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Vladislaus I VON BÖHMEN 1069 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen 34 und seine Mutter Świętosława Piast 26. Er hat 1110 Richenza von Berg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 12. April 1125 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Prag, Böhmen, Tschechoslowakei und wurde in Prag, Böhmen, Tschechoslowakei begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Vladislaus I VON BÖHMEN è nato il nel 1069, il suo padre, Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Świętosława Piast, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Richenza von Berg nel 1110. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 aprile 1125, nel Praga, Čechy, Cecoslovacchia, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Praga, Čechy, Cecoslovacchia.

ja.Prague, Bohemia: チェコスロバキアcエチイプラハ
ja.St Maria, Prague, Bohemia: チェコスロバキアcエチイプラハ
チェコスロバキアプラハ
ja.lifeSummary: Vladislaus I VON BÖHMENが1069年に生まれた時，父Vratislav (II.) von Böhmenは34歳，母Świętosława Piastは26歳であった。1110年にRichenza von Bergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1125年4月12日にチェコスロバキアcエチイプラハで56歳で死去し，チェコスロバキアcエチイプラハにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Vladislaus I VON BÖHMEN(이)가 1069년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Świętosława Piast(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1110년 Richenza von Berg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1125년 4월 12일 체코 슬로바키아 cc히 프라하에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 체코 슬로바키아 cc히 프라하에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Vladislaus I VON BÖHMEN nasceu em 1069, seu pai, Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Świętosława Piast, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Richenza von Berg em 1110. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 12 de abril de 1125, em Praha, Čechy, Tchecoslováquia, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Praha, Čechy, Tchecoslováquia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Vladislaus I VON BÖHMEN родился в 1069 г., его отцу по имени Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Świętosława Piast, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Richenza von Berg в 1110 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 12 апреля 1125 г. в местности Прага, cечи, Чехословакия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности Прага, cечи, Чехословакия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Vladislaus I VON BÖHMEN nació en 1069, su papá, Vratislav (II.) von Böhmen, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Świętosława Piast, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Richenza von Berg en 1110. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de abril de 1125, en Praga, Čechy, Checoslovaquia, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Praga, Čechy, Checoslovaquia.
